channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How retirement living could ease pressure on Australia’s hospitals and aged care system
item.description: A recent report highlights that more than 3,000 older Australians are currently occupying hospital beds despite being medically fit for discharge, underscoring growing pressure on Australia’s health a...

item.title: Uncertainty surrounds US-Iran talks in Pakistan as ceasefire deadline approaches
item.description: The United States is preparing to send a high-level delegation, led by Vice President JD Vance, to Islamabad for potential talks with Iran, despite Tehran not confirming its participation. The planned...

item.title: Oburu Oginga cautions against scrapping fuel taxes as Kenya debates high pump prices
item.description: ODM leader and Senate Energy Committee chair Oburu Oginga has warned against calls to fully scrap fuel taxes, saying such moves would risk destabilising Kenya’s public finances. His remarks come amid ...

item.title: Why India's Learning Crisis Lacks Urgent Response
item.description: India faces a profound learning crisis, yet there is a striking lack of urgency in addressing it. Despite alarming reports showing that a large number of children cannot read simple texts or perform b...

item.title: CBI arrests Reliance Communications executives over alleged Rs 19,694 crore bank fraud case
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has arrested two senior executives of Reliance Communications (RCOM) in connection with an ongoing probe into alleged financial irregularities and large-scale...

item.title: Limited vessel movement as U.S. and Iran enforce competing blockades in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has sharply declined after both Iran and the United States imposed separate and competing blockades, significantly disrupting one of the world’s most crit...

item.title: Tanzania calls for stronger World Bank support to grow Africa’s private sector and reduce debt pressure
item.description: Tanzania government has formally asked the World Bank to increase support towards the private sector across Africa, saying this is key for long-term economic growth. The Minister for Finance, Khamis M...

item.title: Four Suspects Nabbed in Embu as Police Seize Cannabis in Targeted Anti-Drug Operation
item.description: Police in Embu Township have arrested four suspects following a planned anti-drug operation aimed at tackling the spread of narcotics in the area. According to the National Police Service (NPS), the r...

item.title: Canada Post posts $1.57 billion loss amid labour unrest and declining parcel volumes
item.description: Canada Post reported a significant financial loss of $1.57 billion before tax in 2025, marking the largest deficit in its history and nearly doubling the $841 million loss recorded the previous year. ...

item.title: Daily feng shui guidance from Master Hanz Cua for April 21, 2026

item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is facing mounting political pressure after controversy erupted over the vetting process for Peter Mandelson’s appointment as ambassador to Washington. During a tense an...

item.title: Pakistan’s second nationwide polio campaign misses vaccination target by around 300,000 children
item.description: Pakistan’s second nationwide anti-polio campaign of 2026 has fallen short of its vaccination target by nearly 300,000 children, according to data released by the National Emergency Operations Centre (...

item.title: ODM and UDA Hold Open-Ended Talks Amid Internal Tensions Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: ODM leader Oburu Oginga has indicated that ongoing talks between the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) and the ruling United Democratic Alliance (UDA) are wide-ranging, with no issue ruled out, includi...

item.title: WA man proposes to partner during Western Australian shearing competition
item.description: A Western Australian man has drawn attention after choosing a uniquely local setting to propose to his partner, staging the moment during a shearing competition. The proposal, described in media cover...

item.title: CSPC Nabua graduate leads April 2026 Midwives Licensure Examination results
item.description: A graduate from Camarines Sur Polytechnic Colleges (CSPC) in Nabua emerged as the topnotcher in the April 2026 Midwives Licensure Examination, according to the Professional Regulation Commission (PRC)...

item.title: Op Mahadev Investigation Leads to Justice for Pahalgam Victims

item.title: Israeli leadership denounces soldier’s destruction of Christian crucifix in Lebanese village amid ongoing tensions
